subcategory: navbar with animated mega dropdown menu
use_cases: Primary website navigation with expandable mega menus for categories and subcategories
SaaS platform navigation with account settings and feature discovery dropdowns
E-commerce navigation with product category filtering and multi-column layouts
Enterprise dashboard navigation with team management and productivity tools access
Media/content platform navigation with browsing categories and user account management
ai_summary: A responsive navigation bar component featuring animated mega dropdown menus with smooth Framer Motion transitions. Supports multi-column layouts, hover and click interactions, and customizable animation directions for comprehensive website navigation. Ideal for SaaS platforms, e-commerce sites, and content management systems requiring organized, feature-rich navigation menus with premium animated user experience.
